description: ProShares Trust - ProShares Short S&P500 is an exchange traded fund launched and managed by ProShare Advisors LLC. The fund invests in public equity markets of the United States. The fund invests through derivatives in stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. The fund employs short strategy and uses derivatives such as futures, swaps to create its portfolio. The fund invests in growth and value stocks of large-cap companies. It seeks to track -1x the daily performance of the S&P 500, by using full replication technique. ProShares Trust - ProShares Short S&P500 was formed on June 19, 2006 and is domiciled in the United States.
